case_title: EVAN PENN VS. ALIGN RESIDENTIAL INC. AKA "THE LANDING"

AKA "THE LANDING" IS NOT PRESENT. NO VALID PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,300.00 FILED BY PENN, EVAN AS TO DEFENDANT ALIGN RESIDENTIAL INC. AKA "THE LANDING" ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENN, EVAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALIGN RESIDENTIAL INC. AKA "THE LANDING" $3,764.99 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,929.99, CONSIDERED ALL COMPETENT EVIDENCE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
